# Invoice Management (No Security)

### Endpoints

| Méthode | URL | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| `POST` | `/api/invoices/search` | Recherche paginée |

### Filtres

`tenantId`, `month` (**requis**), `accountNumber`, `operationType`
